name: solution-arch
description: Phase 3 (Solutioning) worker for ScenarioForge. Reads each scenario's traces_down (entities + apis from domain-design, pages from screen-binding) and composes feature units (FE-xxx) with their layering — controller, service/handler, repository, DI — into features.json, writing traces_down.features back to the scenario spine. Says HOW the design is assembled; never invents entities or writes code.
